description: Style NoteTake a refined approach to workwear bags with bulchee's Spring '12 line. The line has minimal hardware and are delectably hued (and are crafted from handpicked materials) so you'll want more than just one. Guaranteed to leave you "bag-struck", punctuate your everyday ensemble with this uber cool bag.Product DetailsCroc hide style textured black bag with two short handles (that has a hanging decoration)Two flap pockets in the front with twist-and-lift closuresOne main zipped compartment with a zipped separator, zipped pocket and two pouchesOne zipped pocket at the backMaterial and Care LeatheretteWipe with a clean cloth to remove dustDo not expose to detergents, alcohol or petroleumSizeHeight: 24 cmWidth: 35 cmDepth: 12 cm
